Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Philip T. Kilduff, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, South of Market Child Care.
Defaulted defendant Eugene Jun Kwock Tom appearing on his own behalf. The Court informs the defendant that a default has been enter against him.

No Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
The request to enter default has been rejected.
No dismissal of Does 1-10 on file.

The Court informs counsel for the Plaintiff that a live witness is required to attend the hearing to present evidence of the Defendant damages owed to the Plaintiff.

The Court orders the matter off calendar.

Hearing On Defendant'S Motion To Set Aside The Default And Default Judgment.
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant and moving party Eugene Jun Kwock Tom's Motion to Set Aside the Default entered July 29, 2009 (Amended Defaults were entered on October 10, 2008 & December 9, 2008), and the Default Judgment entered May 12, 2009.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Steven Booska, Esq. appeared for plaintiff South of Market Child Care.
Randall P. Choy, Esq. appeared for defendant Eugene Jun Kwock Tom, who was not present at today's hearing.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, defendant and moving party Eugene Jun Kwock Tom's Motion is GRANTED, and the default entered July 29, 2008 (as amended on October 10, 2008 & December 9, 2008), and Default Judgment entered May 12, 2009, are hereby SET ASIDE.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Steven Booska, Esq. for Plaintiff: South of Market Child Care.
Plaintiff's Witness Noushin Mofakham was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant:Eugene Jun Kwock Tom as follows:
Damages $200,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $1,666.00
Attorney's Fees $5,000.00
Costs $475.00, for a total of $207,141.00
Judgment signed in open court.
